name: urgent_care_self_scheduler
description: Patient portal self-scheduling for virtual urgent-care visits. Adds a portal widget; the wizard collects a chief complaint and intake info, picks a slot from provider clinic calendars, and books the appointment with an RFV command and an intake task.

handlers.description: Renders the urgent-care scheduling card on the patient portal home page.
Serves the wizard HTML page at /plugin-io/api/urgent_care_self_scheduler/wizard.
GET /api/me — returns the logged-in patient's active medications + allergies.
GET /api/slots — returns available urgent-care slots for the next few days.
POST /api/book — books the urgent-care visit (Appointment + Task + RFV stash).
Listens for APPOINTMENT_CREATED on plugin-booked visits, originates the ReasonForVisitCommand on the new encounter note from the stashed intake.
